daily.today_energy: Your vibe is restless in the best way—like you're ready to shake something up. The stars are basically telling you to trust those random ideas that pop into your head today. Something's brewing beneath the surface.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, there's a magnetism happening. If you're in something, a real conversation is calling. If you're flying solo, someone interesting might catch your attention in the most unexpected place.
daily.career: Your creative energy is peaked right now. This is the day to pitch that idea you've been sitting on or take a small risk on a project. Your intuition about what works is genuinely sharp—don't second-guess yourself.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and fresh air. Even a walk clears your head way more than you'd think today. Listen if you're feeling off about anything—your gut's pretty accurate rn.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is pushing you toward authenticity. Mercury's movements suggest it's time to stop people-pleasing and start speaking your truth. The universe is literally asking: what do you actually want?
weekly.love: Venus is giving soft, vulnerable energy. If you're coupled up, real conversations are flowing naturally. Single? Someone might slide in with genuine interest, but only if you're being real first. No masks needed.
weekly.career: Jupiter's backing your ambitions hard right now. That project you've been sitting on? Time to actually pitch it. Doors are opening for those brave enough to walk through them. Trust your instincts.
weekly.health: Your energy levels are fluctuating, so honor that. Some days you'll feel unstoppable, others you'll crave rest—both are valid. Moving your body in ways that feel good (not punishing) will help balance things out.
